name: By Rose Alone
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: For every instance of DMG dealt by the wielder, there is a [StateArg3]% chance for the wielder to gain 2% Temporary Crit. DMG. After the wielder releases Exalt, they deal Active DMG 3 times to a random enemy equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's ATK. If the current realm is {Caro}, for every {Embryo} devoured, {Embryo Fusion} +[StateArg2]%.
lore:
A countryside village girl wearing an extravagant gown, gold and silver jewelry, and a feather fan sneaks into the world of the elite...
Nothing could be more improper than this. A person of lower status trespassing into our ranks is simply scandalous...!
I say, there should be mandatory identification badges indicating their status, so they are not mistaken for one of us.
—Duke Philip Harold

If you live in Londinium, you must be familiar with the so-called "Sorel Effect." 
Still worried that your clothes won't sell? You'd better pray you have some connections to gain the favor of Lady Sorel—yes, even a ridiculously silly pig-tail dress hat, if placed on Lady Sorel's head, will sell like hotcakes.
She is the pop idol of the new era.
—"The Fame Quiz of Lady Sorel," The Lady's Guide

It was a clear summer night.
We sat together on the marble-paved terrace, sipping aged noble botrytis wine, discussing poetry and world peace.
And then something happened @4
Get to the point? Ahem, my apologies...
In short, this woman cheated me out of three thousand Leo Fang, two properties in Soreland, and a sincere heart!
—A heartbroken viscount who wishes to remain anonymous
